married as Venus aspects Saturn. He will get a new
job and make a steady progress. He will begin to save from the time Saturn
enters Capricorn. Between 40-45, he will own a house. As Venus is exalted
the native will have two sisters. He will live upto 65-68 years.
CHART 380
The native's father will be a
teamed man (the Sun conjunct Mer Sun Jupt.
Ven. Mars
cury). He will be a cultivator (the Sun Mer. Dt.
has Mars in the second to him). As
Saturn has the Sun and Mercury in the Moon
seventh, the native will get a decent
job in Government but upto 32, the
earnings will be low. Thereafter;
things will improve. Saturn and the
Sun both exalted indicate early death Db. Sat.
of father. But as the Moon, indicating
mother, is strong in her own place with Jupiter-Ketu combination in the 12th·
to her, she will have good luck and so the death of her husband will be
postponed (Mangalya Yoga). The Father's health will not be good. From 40
